Landing.lede: A free AI training companion designed for everyone — kids, parents, seniors. Adapts to your fitness, equipment, weather and goals.
Landing.feature1Body: Daily training tailored to your age, fitness, equipment and the weather outside.
Landing.feature2Body: Built for kids, adults and seniors, with accessible UI and clear instructions.
Landing.feature3Body: Join challenges, log activities, share short videos with #SmartMoveChallenge.

Challenge.intro: Inspire others. Record a 15-30 second video of you moving — yoga, walk, dance, anything — and share the link with your community. Together we make movement go viral.
Challenge.submitted: Thanks for sharing! Your video will inspire others.
Challenge.feedEmpty: Be the first to share. Make it count.
